title: Contractor profile
subtitle: This information will be used for payments and on tax documents, so double-check that it's accurate.

w9EditWarning.label: Editing this profile will require a new W-9
w9EditWarning.body: This contractor has already signed a W-9. If you change these details, you'll need to have them sign a new W-9.

selfOnboarding.title: Complete your profile
selfOnboarding.individualDescription: Please verify your name and provide your Social Security Number.
selfOnboarding.businessDescription: Please verify your business name and provide your EIN.

selfOnboarding.label: Invite this contractor to enter some of their own details online
selfOnboarding.description: Your contractor will be invited to enter their information on their own time.

startDate.label: Start Date
startDate.description: Your contractor's first day of work at your company

validations.email: Email is required when inviting contractor
validations.emailFormat: Email must be a valid email address
validations.firstName: First name is required for individual contractors
validations.lastName: Last name is required for individual contractors
validations.ssn: SSN is required for individual contractors
validations.businessName: Business name is required for business contractors
validations.ein: EIN is required for business contractors
validations.hourlyRate: Hourly rate is required for hourly contractors
